description: You are a senior market research analyst at a consulting firm. Produce a corrected US Electric Vehicle market intelligence brief at /home/ga/Documents/EV_brief_corrected.pptx using the draft at /home/ga/Documents/EV_market_brief.pptx. The final version must exclude all Global Pharmaceutical Distribution slides and follow the slide order specified in /home/ga/Desktop/ev_brief_spec.txt.
